info.name: ClearSky Google Review Webhooks
info.description: Simulate Google Business Profile review webhooks for testing the complete 12-step ClearSky pipeline.

body.raw:
{
  "provider": "google_business_profile",
  "provider_event_name": "review.created",
  "review_id": "gbp_review_pos_static_001",
  "location_id": "gbp_location_1199",
  "author_name": "John Doe",
  "rating": 5,
  "comment": "Absolutely incredible service! The team replaced my entire roof in two days. Cleaned up everything. Best contractor in Timmins.",
  "created_time": "2024-05-08T12:00:00Z"
}

{
  "provider": "google_business_profile",
  "provider_event_name": "review.created",
  "review_id": "gbp_review_neg_static_001",
  "location_id": "gbp_location_1199",
  "author_name": "Margaret T.",
  "rating": 1,
  "comment": "Emergency! My roof is leaking after the repair they did last week. I have called 5 times and no one answers. Water is coming into my kitchen right now!",
  "created_time": "2024-05-08T13:00:00Z"
}

{
  "provider": "google_business_profile",
  "provider_event_name": "review.created",
  "review_id": "gbp_review_mixed_static_001",
  "location_id": "gbp_location_1199",
  "author_name": "Sarah M.",
  "rating": 4,
  "comment": "The crew was professional and the job looks good. Only reason I'm giving 4 stars is because communication before the appointment was a little slow.",
  "created_time": "2024-05-08T14:00:00Z"
}

{
  "provider": "google_business_profile",
  "provider_event_name": "review.created",
  "review_id": "gbp_review_neutral_static_001",
  "location_id": "gbp_location_1199",
  "author_name": "Bob B.",
  "rating": 3,
  "comment": "Average experience. The roof was fixed but they left some shingles on my lawn. Took a few days to get a callback for the quote.",
  "created_time": "2024-05-08T15:00:00Z"
}

{
  "provider": "google_business_profile",
  "provider_event_name": "review.created",
  "review_id": "gbp_review_ops_static_001",
  "location_id": "gbp_location_1199",
  "author_name": "Alex P.",
  "rating": 2,
  "comment": "I am not even a customer. Your trucks blocked my driveway for 3 hours while you were working next door. Very inconsiderate drivers.",
  "created_time": "2024-05-08T16:00:00Z"
}
